ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "fit_us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "fit_uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "fit_eu_size" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve measurement in cm */,
  "clothing_length" REAL /* Clothing length measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in cm */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement in cm */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in cm */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  "size_chart_path" TEXT /* File path to a size chart image for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the product in USD */,
  "price_eur" REAL /* Price of the product in EUR */,
  "price_gbp" REAL /* Price of the product in GBP */,
  "size_chart_path" TEXT /* File path to a size chart specific to the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is active in the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the category image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_path" TEXT /* File path to the brand logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the brand is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product size was added to the inventory */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the product size was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's billing address */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the order (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., web, mobile app, store) */,
  "date_shipped" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "date_delivered" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the order item was added to the order */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred language */,
  "currency_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred currency */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is approved for display */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, customer service) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "currency_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred currency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
